notes: Added DNF-style framed equipment cells, item quality borders and a denser straight-line metal window treatment across the whole UI.
Inventory and shop windows now support paged storage browsing, making larger collections easier to scan without one long list.
Profile and inventory now support drag-and-drop equipment changes, so weapon / armor / accessory can be swapped more like a traditional page game client.
Added a skill quickbar system with four slots, including drag assignment inside the skill window and a persistent quickbar display on the main game screen.
